ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment type of the employee */,
  "graduate_or_not" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee is a graduate */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the employee */,
  "family_members" INTEGER /* Number of family members in the employee's household */,
  "chronic_diseases" INTEGER /* Number of chronic diseases the employee has */,
  "frequent_flyer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee is a frequent flyer */,
  "ever_travelled_abroad" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee has ever travelled abroad */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position or job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "is_part_time" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employment type is part-time */,
  "is_contractor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employment type is for contractors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronic_diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronic disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the chronic disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chronic disease */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the chronic disease (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_chronic_diseases" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chronic disease */,
  "diagnosed_date" TEXT /* Date the disease was diagnosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_chronic_diseases_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_chronic_diseases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES chronic_diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_records" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who travelled */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of the travel */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the travel */,
  "travel_type" TEXT /* Type of travel (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of travel (e.g., air, car, train) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return from travel */,
  "travel_cost" REAL /* Cost of the travel */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_records_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequent_flyer_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequent flyer program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequent flyer program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequent flyer program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the frequent flyer program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_frequent_flyer_programs" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequent flyer program */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the employee has in the program */,
  "last_flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the last flight taken under the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_frequent_flyer_programs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_frequent_flyer_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES frequent_flyer_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Blood pressure reading */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol level */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Glucose level */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis or health status */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the employee */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Any medications the employee is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit package */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit package */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Description of the coverage provided by the benefit package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefit_packages" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit package */,
  "enroll_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit package */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit package is due for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefit_packages_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefit_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES benefit_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR manager, HR analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
